highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.88.5 fixes SKXamlCanvas on WASM and rounds SKRectI conversions the right way.

bullets.detail: Converting a `SKRect` to `SKRectI` now floors outwards so the integer rectangle fully contains the source instead of clipping fractional pixels.

bullets.lead: SKXamlCanvas tolerates a missing canvas on WASM
bullets.detail: The WASM `SKXamlCanvas` no longer fails when the target canvas element can't be found, matching the behaviour on other platforms.

bullets.lead: Uno canvas context is active on render
bullets.detail: On Uno, the canvas' GL context is ensured active before rendering, avoiding intermittent blank frames.
